uplink.description: data frame, no motion (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Upstream input reused; expected.data authored from reference/upstream-codec.js field extraction (level mm big-endian, temp bytes[8], motion=bytes[12]>>4, full=bytes[11]>>4, batteryLow=bytes[12]&0x0f, frameCounter=bytes[13..14]). Angle sign byte bytes[9]=1 (low nibble set) -> -0 = 0; upstream sign bug corrected per AUTHORING.md.

uplink.description: data frame, motion detected (full + low-battery flags set, +30 deg tilt)
uplink._note: Synthetic frame to exercise action.motion.detected=true. bytes[12]=0x11 -> motion high nibble set (true), low nibble set (batteryLow true); bytes[11]=0x10 -> full true; bytes[9]=0 sign nibble clear -> positive, bytes[10]=30 -> +30 deg; level=(0<<8)+200=200 mm; temp=bytes[8]=18; frameCounter=(0<<8)+5=5.

uplink.description: parameter-report / command-confirmation frame (25 bytes, bytes[3]=0x03) -> error

errors: parameter report frame carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: Upstream emits device settings (intervals/thresholds/motion-enable/ultrasonic-range), not a measurement; normalized as an error.
